newProducts.title: Cursor AI
newProducts.description: An AI-powered code editor with advanced code completion, refactoring capabilities, and natural language programming support. Features include multi-file editing, intelligent debugging, and seamless integration with popular development workflows.

newProducts.title: Aider
newProducts.description: AI pair programming tool that works in your terminal. Enables collaborative coding with AI models, supports multiple files, and integrates with git for version control. Features include automatic commit generation and code review assistance.

newProducts.title: Supermaven
newProducts.description: AI code completion tool with fast, context-aware suggestions. Claims to be faster than alternatives with better code understanding and supports multiple programming languages. Available as IDE extensions for VS Code, IntelliJ, and others.

newProducts.title: Continue
newProducts.description: Open-source AI code assistant that can be self-hosted or cloud-based. Integrates with popular IDEs and supports custom AI models. Features include code generation, explanation, and debugging assistance with enterprise options.

newProducts.title: Codeium
newProducts.description: Free AI code completion and chat tool for developers. Offers intelligent code suggestions, refactoring help, and natural language code generation. Supports over 70 programming languages and integrates with major IDEs.

newProducts.title: Refact.ai
newProducts.description: AI coding assistant with focus on code quality and team collaboration. Features include automated code reviews, documentation generation, and pair programming capabilities with multiple AI model support.

newProducts.title: OpenCoder
newProducts.description: Open-source code language model designed for code generation and understanding. Can be fine-tuned for specific codebases and integrated into custom development workflows.

newProducts.title: Windsurf
newProducts.description: AI-powered development environment by Codeium that combines code completion with intelligent agent capabilities for multi-file editing and project-wide refactoring.

whitelistUpdates.title: CLI Stable Release v1.5.14
whitelistUpdates.description: Direct stable release from main branch. Version 1.5.14 built and published directly from the latest main branch.

whitelistUpdates.title: Continue 1.0 Launch
whitelistUpdates.description: Major release announcement with press coverage on TechCrunch and AP News.

insights.title: Example: New Advances in Self-Correcting AI Code Systems
insights.description: Recent breakthroughs in AI systems that can automatically identify and fix their own code errors, improving reliability and reducing debugging time by up to 60% in early tests.

insights.source: Blog | Twitter | HN | YouTube | Reddit | Paper

insights.title: Example: The Future of AI Pair Programming
insights.description: Discussion on how AI assistants are evolving from simple autocomplete to active pair programming partners that can suggest architectural patterns and catch logical errors.
insights.author: Another Expert
